prestazioni: Replace the stock **Rothsport Engineering 6.0L V8 (code: VECTOR-6.0TT)** internals with forged **Manley Performance** 4340 steel crankshaft (92.8mm stroke), **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, and **JE Pistons** 2618-T6 forged slugs (9.0:1 compression) to handle 1,200+ HP on **VP Racing Fuels Q16** (116 octane).

Upgrade the twin **Garrett T04E-50** turbos to **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA** billet wheel units (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegates (set to 2.2 bar peak boost) and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for instant spool and zero lag.

Swap the stock **Bosch Motronic 1.7** ECU for a **Syvecs S8 Plug & Play** standalone with **custom Vector W8-specific maps**, integrating **AEM X-Series** wideband O2 sensors, **Motec C125** dash logger, and **Nitrous Express** 200-shot direct-port kit (wet system) for 0-60 mph in 2.8s.
estetica: Install a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **custom Vector Aeromotive** side-exit exhaust tips (3.5" titanium) and **Vorsteiner V-FF 107** forged wheels (20x12 front, 20x13 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (285/30/20 front, 335/25/20 rear).

Replace the stock pop-up headlights with **Hella H9077** LED projectors (CSP chip, 5,000K) and **Anzo USA** carbon fiber headlight housings, paired with **Morimoto XB35** fog lights and a **Seibon Carbon** hood (dual functional vents for turbo heat extraction).

Apply a **3M Matte Military Green (212)** full-body vinyl wrap with **Avery Dennison** gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and diffuser, complemented by **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** (custom Vector logo) and a **AIT Racing** carbon fiber rear wing (dual-element, 1,200 lbs downforce at 180 mph).
